creator: simon@zymurgy.org
text:
Trying to build / install deskutils/lightning-xpi results in 


 lightning is using thunderbird for gecko support, but you can
 change that by defining WITH_GECKO to the following values:

   thunderbird 

===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
=> lightning-0.8-tb-FreeBSD7-i386.xpi is not in /usr/ports/deskutils/lightning-xpi/distinfo.
=> Either /usr/ports/deskutils/lightning-xpi/distinfo is out of date, or
=> lightning-0.8-tb-FreeBSD7-i386.xpi is spelled incorrectly.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/deskutils/lightning-xpi.

How-To-Repeat: Try to build port deskutils/lightning-xpi from a recent portsnapped ports treee
